notes: Replaced repeated warm palette, metadata text, border, and typographic literals across the songs surface with bindings to the draft token CSS variables.
Preserved the stronger dark selected-card treatment in SongList as an intentional local exception so selection contrast does not regress.
Kept layout structure and user interactions unchanged while reducing one-off values.
open_issues: Selected-state colors are still local and may later benefit from dedicated semantic inverse tokens.
A few spacing values remain local where the current surface tuning is still more specific than the draft token set.
